skipped_packages.name: serve_alm_persona
skipped_packages.error_sample: build/artifacts/serve_alm_persona.c: use of undeclared identifier 'exec_capture'; did you mean 'hx_exec_capture'?
skipped_packages.root_cause: hexa transpiler emits unmangled name 'exec_capture' for the builtin (call sites at lines 526/533/540/559/567/712/721/723/804/815/922/979/1016/1052) while runtime.c declares the symbol as 'hx_exec_capture'. Source .hexa is correct; codegen mangling is missing for this builtin.
skipped_packages.remediation: upstream fix in /Users/ghost/core/hexa-lang/self/native/hexa_v2 — add builtin-name mangling for exec_capture (matches existing hx_now / hx_exec_capture pattern)

skipped_packages.name: h100_post_launch_ingest

skipped_packages.remediation: upstream fix — add builtin-name mangling for 'now' in hexa_v2 codegen

anima_action: no source change required; shim packaging (interpreter exec via hexa) remains the working artifact
